message:
Fix perf bottlenecks, rewrite beads page, lint cleanup

Performance:
- Remove body::before noise overlay (full-viewport GPU layer at z-9999)
- Remove permanent will-change from .glass-modern (dozens of extra layers)
- Remove animate-pulse from large hero blur divs
- Remove animate-bounce/animate-float from hero elements
- Deduplicate body and scrollbar CSS rules

Beads page:
- Rewrite with stats bar, larger viewer, methodology section, CTA
- Remove grayscale filter from iframe
- Wider aspect ratio (16:10) for embedded viewer

Lint auto-fixes across getting-started, war-stories, feature-card,
franken-eye, and site-header.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Elm Architecture

-

- Every app is a Model +{" "} - update +{" "} - view. Side effects flow - through typed Cmd values, - never raw I/O. The runtime drives the loop, so your logic stays - pure and testable. +

Elm Model

+

+ Pure state transitions. No hidden I/O. Logic stays clean and testable.

- {/* Inline Mode */} - -
-
- + +

-

Inline Mode

-

- Render a stable UI region at the top or bottom of your terminal - while logs and output scroll above. Unlike alternate-screen - frameworks, your scrollback history is fully preserved. +

Inline First

+

+ Preserve terminal history while keeping UI chrome stable.

- {/* Screen Modes */} - -
-
- + +
+
+
-

Screen Modes

-

- Choose{" "} - ScreenMode::Alternate for - full-screen dashboards, or{" "} - ScreenMode::Inline for - CLI tools that live alongside your shell. Switch modes at - any time without losing state. +

One-Writer

+

+ Zero race conditions. All output flows through a single serialized gate.
